name: File Zipper Bot
description: A Telegram bot that compresses, manages, and uncompresses files.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from my.telegram.org

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB connection URI (optional — leave blank to use in-memory storage that resets on restart)

FORCE_SUBSCRIBE.description: Require users to join the support channels before using the bot
